executive_summary: 159999.SZ is identified by Tushare as 永赢中证500ETF(退市), a passive equity ETF benchmarked to 中证500指数收益率. Because the fund is delisted and current review data is missing, profile fails the active-status gate, valuation is blocked, liquidity fails, and ResearchFirst remains required.

Asset type confirmed: 股票型 ETF, passive index style, benchmarked to 中证500指数收益率.
Active-status profile gate fails because Tushare status is delisted.
Liquidity gate fails because recent complete-day fund activity records were unavailable from Tushare.
Valuation gate is blocked because no current NAV or comparable active-market series was available.
reasoning: A delisted ETF cannot be treated as an active approved target-pool candidate from this research snapshot.
Missing current daily, NAV, and unit-scale records prevent a ratio-only valuation check.
The ETF valuation payload records a zero review score only as a blocked-state marker, not as a fair-value estimate.
Risk disclosure is complete enough to preserve the ResearchFirst blocker and prevent downstream actionability.
risks: Delisting status makes current profile and liquidity assumptions invalid.
Any symbol reuse, code migration, or successor product must be verified before this object is reviewed again.

invalidation_conditions: A verified active successor instrument with a different code supersedes this blocked snapshot.
A later authoritative source contradicts the delisted status.
must_not_do: Do not use this snapshot as external execution output.
